elements.title: Agent Supply Chain and Dependency Risk

notes: All 10 names confirmed against the v0.8 PDF (downloaded from the authoritative source, 4.4MB, PDF metadata title "AIVSS Scoring System For OWASP Agentic AI Core Security Risks v0.8"; document body line 3239 states "This document represents version 0.8"). Each risk name was cross-checked in three independent places in the extracted text: the summary table of contents (p.contents), the detailed section 3.6.1-3.6.10 contents, and the numbered body section headers. AIVSS has NO alphanumeric element IDs; the ordinal 1-10 is used as id per the extraction spec. WORDING CAVEAT: item 4's authoritative title spells the conjunction as "and" -> "Agent Orchestration and Multi-Agent Exploitation". The task brief supplied it with an ampersand ("&"); the source wording ("and") is used here. All other titles match the task-supplied list verbatim. The homepage (https://aivss.owasp.org/) confirms v0.8 as current but does not enumerate the risks; the enumerated list lives only in the linked PDF, which is the recorded source_url.
